title: NA-Non ULIP
word_text:
What is Viklang Pension Yojana and Who Can Avail It?
The Viklang Pension Yojana is a government program that provides monthly assistance to people with disabilities living in Uttar Pradesh. This monthly allowance that comes from this pension yojana is beneficial to differently-abled individuals in meeting their everyday expenses and ultimately living a better life. The scheme is managed by the Uttar Pradesh Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities Department to support people with disabilities.
What is Viklang Pension?
The Viklang Pension Yojana is a financial assistance program launched by the Uttar Pradesh government. It provides a monthly pension to people with disabilities who are permanent state residents and presently living in Uttar Pradesh. This pension yojana aims to support individuals with disabilities by providing them with a steady income to help cover their daily needs and expenses. The scheme covers persons with disabilities such as visual impairment, hearing loss, locomotor disability, mental retardation, and other physical or mental challenges.
Under this scheme, eligible beneficiaries receive ₹1,000 per beneficiary per month directly into their bank accounts. This assistance helps improve their living standards and offers some financial independence.
Eligibility Criteria for Viklang Pension
To qualify for the viklang pension eligibility, applicants must meet the following criteria:
You must be a resident of Uttar Pradesh and should currently be residing in the state.
Your age should be 18 years.
You must have at least 40% disability.
Your family’s income currently should be Rs. 46080 per year- in rural areas and Rs. 56460  per year in urban areas.
You should not be getting aid under any other  pension scheme.
People receiving free sustenance in government institutions/shelters will not be eligible for this scheme.
The viklang pension eligibility criteria ensures that pension benefits are provided to persons with disabilities who are financially vulnerable and require assistance.
Documents Required to Apply Viklang Pension
The documents required to apply for viklang pension yojana includes:
Disability Certificate: Issued by a government medical officer or authorized hospital confirming at least 40% disability. If you are suffering with hearing disabilities or  mental depression then the disability certificate issued by Ram Manohar Lohia Joint Hospital, Gomtisagar, Lucknow. will be needed
Income Certificate: Issued by local authorities such as MP, MLA, Mayor, Tehsildar, or Village Head etc.
Age Proof: Birth certificate or 10th class certificate.
Identity Proof: Voter ID, Aadhaar Card, Ration Card.
Bank Passbook: To link the pension amount for direct transfer.
Passport Size Photograph: A recent color photo, usually less than 20 KB in size.
These documents help verify the applicant’s eligibility and ensure the pension reaches the rightful beneficiary.
How to Apply for Viklang Pension Yojana?
To apply viklang pension, follow these steps:
Visit the official Uttar Pradesh Social Security Pension Portal at https://sspy-up.gov.in/EnglishPages/index_en.aspx.
Click on the "Apply Online" option under the Viklang Pension Scheme.
Fill in the application form with personal details, disability information, income details, and bank account information.
Upload the required documents and a passport-size photograph.
Apply and take a printout of the acknowledgement slip.
This process ensures a smooth and transparent application for the pension.
How to Check Viklang Pension Status?
To check the status of your Viklang  Security Pension Portal.
Click on the "Application Status" link on the homepage.
Register as a user and create a password if you haven’t already.
Select "Viklang Pension Scheme" from the drop-down menu.
Enter your application number, bank account number, and the captcha code.
Click "Submit" to view the current status of your application.
This online status check helps applicants conveniently track their pension application progress.
Conclusion
The Viklang Pension Yojana is a government program that helps people with disabilities in Uttar Pradesh by giving them a monthly pension. It helps improve their daily life and financial situation. This pension scheme supports differently abled persons and works well with other financial products like life insurance plans and term insurance plans to help secure their future.
Frequently Asked Questions
What are the benefits of the Viklang Pension Yojana?
The Viklang Pension Yojana provides ₹1000 per beneficiary per month to individuals who qualify under the eligibility criteria and have  a 40% disability. The funds are sent to the linked bank account of the beneficiary . The pension assists individuals with disabilities in coping with some of their basic expenses.
How do I access the beneficiary list for the UP Viklang Pension?
To check the list, visit the official pension portal, go to the 'Disabled Pension' section. You'll see a list of selected persons (beneficiaries) year-wise. If you wish to find your name, check the year, district, and your area.
Can I receive the Viklang pension if I own a two-wheeler vehicle?
No. As per the rules, if you own a two-wheeler or any other personal vehicle, you are not eligible for the Viklang Pension Yojana. This rule assesses the applicant's financial need.
Disclaimer:
The content provided is for general informational purposes only. The material is compiled from publicly available sources, internal insights, and other information deemed reliable. While reasonable care has been taken in compiling the information, Bajaj Allianz Life Insurance Co. Ltd. assumes no liability for its accuracy. full_pdf_text:
What is Viklang Pension Yojana and Who Can Avail It?
The Viklang Pension Yojana is a government program that provides monthly assistance to people with disabilities living in Uttar Pradesh. This monthly allowance that comes from this pension yojana is beneficial to differently-abled individuals in meeting their everyday expenses and ultimately living a better life. The scheme is managed by the Uttar Pradesh Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities Department to support people with disabilities.
What is Viklang Pension?
The Viklang Pension Yojana is a financial assistance program launched by the Uttar Pradesh government. It provides a monthly pension to people with disabilities who are permanent state residents and presently living in Uttar Pradesh. This pension yojana aims to support individuals with disabilities by providing them with a steady income to help cover their daily needs and expenses. The scheme covers persons with disabilities such as visual impairment, hearing loss, locomotor disability, mental retardation, and other physical or mental challenges.
Under this scheme, eligible beneficiaries receive ₹1,000 per beneficiary per month directly into their bank accounts. This assistance helps improve their living standards and offers some financial independence.
Eligibility Criteria for Viklang Pension
To qualify for the viklang pension eligibility, applicants must meet the following criteria:
● You must be a resident of Uttar Pradesh and should currently be residing in the state. ● Your age should be 18 years. ● You must have at least 40% disability. ● Your family’s income currently should be Rs. 46080 per year- in rural areas and Rs. 56460 per year in urban areas. ● You should not be getting aid under any other pension scheme. ● People receiving free sustenance in government institutions/shelters will not be eligible for this scheme.
The viklang pension eligibility criteria ensures that pension benefits are provided to persons with disabilities who are financially vulnerable and require assistance.
Documents Required to Apply Viklang Pension
The documents required to apply for viklang pension yojana includes:
● Disability Certificate: Issued by a government medical officer or authorized hospital confirming at least 40% disability. If you are suffering with hearing disabilities or mental depression then the disability certificate issued by Ram Manohar Lohia Joint Hospital, Gomtisagar, Lucknow. will be needed ● Income Certificate: Issued by local authorities such as MP, MLA, Mayor, Tehsildar, or Village Head etc. ● Age Proof: Birth certificate or 10th class certificate. ● Identity Proof: Voter ID, Aadhaar Card, Ration Card. ● Bank Passbook: To link the pension amount for direct transfer. ● Passport Size Photograph: A recent color photo, usually less than 20 KB in size.
These documents help verify the applicant’s eligibility and ensure the pension reaches the rightful beneficiary.
How to Apply for Viklang Pension Yojana?
To apply viklang pension, follow these steps:
1. Visit the official Uttar Pradesh Social Security Pension Portal at https://sspy-
up.gov.in/EnglishPages/index_en.aspx. 2. Click on the "Apply Online" option under the Viklang Pension Scheme. 3. Fill in the application form with personal details, disability information, income details, and bank
account information. 4. Upload the required documents and a passport-size photograph. 5. Apply and take a printout of the acknowledgement slip.
This process ensures a smooth and transparent application for the pension.
How to Check Viklang Pension Status?
1. To check the status of your Viklang Security Pension Portal. 2. Click on the "Application Status" link on the homepage. 3. Register as a user and create a password if you haven’t already. 4. Select "Viklang Pension Scheme" from the drop-down menu. 5. Enter your application number, bank account number, and the captcha code. 6. Click "Submit" to view the current status of your application.
This online status check helps applicants conveniently track their pension application progress.
Conclusion
The Viklang Pension Yojana is a government program that helps people with disabilities in Uttar Pradesh by giving them a monthly pension. It helps improve their daily life and financial situation. This
pension scheme supports differently abled persons and works well with other financial products like life insurance plans and term insurance plans to help secure their future.
Frequently Asked Questions
1. What are the benefits of the Viklang Pension Yojana?
The Viklang Pension Yojana provides ₹1000 per beneficiary per month to individuals who qualify under the eligibility criteria and have a 40% disability. The funds are sent to the linked bank account of the beneficiary . The pension assists individuals with disabilities in coping with some of their basic expenses.
2. How do I access the beneficiary list for the UP Viklang Pension?
To check the list, visit the official pension portal, go to the 'Disabled Pension' section. You'll see a list of selected persons (beneficiaries) year-wise. If you wish to find your name, check the year, district, and your area.
3. Can I receive the Viklang pension if I own a two-wheeler vehicle?
No. As per the rules, if you own a two-wheeler or any other personal vehicle, you are not eligible for the Viklang Pension Yojana. This rule assesses the applicant's financial need.
